Campaign 01 · Gisou

Honey Ritual · Campaign Concept

Brand
Gisou
Campaign
Honey Ritual
Type
Speculative Concept
Channels
Social · Email · UGC
Palette

Gisou is a luxury haircare brand built around a single hero ingredient: honey from a family beehive. Their following is devoted, their aesthetic is beautiful, and community sits at the heart of everything they do.

This campaign, Honey Ritual, is designed to deepen brand affinity and drive organic reach by positioning everyday haircare as something worth sharing. Warm. Intentional. Unmistakably Gisou.

Touch Points

Where it
lives.

01
Social Media
Instagram and TikTok at the centre. Short form video and editorial imagery built around the ritual aesthetic. Designed to stop the scroll, earn saves and grow the community organically.
02
Email Marketing
A warm, editorial email sequence bringing the Honey Ritual concept to the inbox. Personal copy, strong CTAs and A/B tested subject lines built to convert browsers into buyers.
03
Landing Page
A dedicated Honey Ritual landing page bringing together the UGC competition, editorial content and a clear path to purchase. The place every channel leads back to.
Content Strategy

The Feed
Aesthetic.

Warm honey tones and golden highlights. Every frame feels like it was shot in late afternoon light
Mix of close ups and lifestyle. Product beauty shots alongside real people in real moments
Slightly undone. Effortless. Aspirational without feeling unreachable. The kind of feed you save, not just scroll past

UGC Content
Content people
actually make.

A curated mix of creator and community content that meets the audience where they already scroll. These are the videos people genuinely want to film: intimate, habitual, aspirational. Gisou fits so naturally into an elevated everyday that sharing it feels like showing off a lifestyle, not promoting a product.

01
'My Sunday Reset' Slow, aesthetic content built around rest and ritual. Positions Gisou as an essential part of a self care routine and performs strongly in wellness and lifestyle niches.
02
'Day in the Life Using Gisou' Lifestyle content that shows the product woven naturally into a real day. Low barrier for creators, high authenticity, broad reach across both Instagram and TikTok.
03
'POV: Hair Wash Day' A trending format reimagined for Gisou. First person, slow, sensory. The kind of content people actually watch all the way through. Taps into an already popular content category and makes the full wash day ritual feel worth filming.
Campaign Hashtags
#HONEY RITUAL & #MYGISOURITUAL

Used across every channel. Not just for reach but to reinforce the idea itself. Make it your ritual. A hashtag people adopt as part of their identity, not just something they copy paste.

UGC Competition
The Mechanic

Win the Full
Honey Bundle.

Participants share a photo or video of their Gisou ritual using #MYGISOURITUAL and tag the brand. Gisou reposts their favourites, creating an incentive that goes well beyond just winning. Being featured means being seen by the brand's entire audience.

1
Film or photograph your Gisou hair ritual
2
Post using #MYGISOURITUAL and tag @gisou
3
Get featured on the Gisou page and enter to win
The Full Gisou
Honey Ritual Set
Everything you need to build the ultimate ritual. Delivered to your door.
Email Marketing
In the inbox

Make it
Personal.

The email sequence brings the Honey Ritual campaign to the inbox with a warm, editorial feel that mirrors the social aesthetic.

Copy is personal, sensory and relaxed. It reflects the brand tone rather than pushing a hard sell. The goal is to make subscribers feel like they're being let in on something, not marketed at.

Subject lines are A/B tested across warm emotional hooks versus curiosity driven openers to find what resonates most with each audience segment.

hello@gisou.com
Website · Landing Page
Campaign Landing Page

The destination
for every channel.

Every channel in this campaign drives traffic to one place. The Honey Ritual landing page is designed to convert. Clear narrative from hero to checkout,, social proof built in and a lead capture mechanism that keeps the conversation going long after the first visit.

gisou.com/honey-ritual-campaign
